---
title: "index.qmd"
author: "David Zuhlsdorf"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### How Much Do Missed Calls Matter? Umpire Accuracy and Potential Impact in the 2025 World Series

##### Abstract:
This project will look at umpire ball and strike call accuracy in the 2025 World Series using Statcast data from baseball savant. 



```{r}
# read in 2025 World Series data
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
data<- read_excel(here::here("data/2025WS_data.xlsx"))

```

```{r}
# Need to make the strike zone and establish what is a strike or ball
clean_data <- data %>%
  filter(des == c("Ball","Called Strike")) %>%
  mutate(ump_call = if_else(des == "Called Strike","Strike","Ball"),
         abs_call = if_else(plate_x >= -0.83 & plate_x <= 0.83 &
                              plate_z >= sz_bot & plate_z <= sz_top,
                            "Strike",
                            "Ball"))
```
